inputs.label: Isotope 1 Mass (amu)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the first isotope in atomic mass units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the first isotope in atomic mass units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci izotopun atomik kütle birimi cinsinden kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des ersten Isotops in atomaren Masseneinheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du premier isotope en unités de masse atomique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del primer isótopo en unidades de masa atómica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة النظير الأول بوحدة الكتلة الذرية.

inputs.label: Isotope 1 Abundance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Relative abundance of the first isotope as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative abundance of the first isotope as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci izotopun bağıl bolluğu yüzde olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Häufigkeit des ersten Isotops in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Abondance relative du premier isotope en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Abundancia relativa del primer isótopo en porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوفرة النسبية للنظير الأول بالنسبة المئوية.

inputs.label: Isotope 2 Mass (amu)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the second isotope in atomic mass units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the second isotope in atomic mass units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci izotopun atomik kütle birimi cinsinden kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des zweiten Isotops in atomaren Masseneinheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du deuxième isotope en unités de masse atomique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del segundo isótopo en unidades de masa atómica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة النظير الثاني بوحدة الكتلة الذرية.

inputs.label: Isotope 2 Abundance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Relative abundance of the second isotope as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative abundance of the second isotope as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci izotopun bağıl bolluğu yüzde olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Häufigkeit des zweiten Isotops in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Abondance relative du deuxième isotope en pourcentage.

businessContext_i18n.ar: الوفرة النسبية للنظير الثاني بالنسبة المئوية.

inputs.label: Isotope 3 Mass (amu)
inputs.businessContext: Optional mass of the third isotope. Leave 0 if not used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional mass of the third isotope. Leave 0 if not used.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü izotopun isteğe bağlı kütlesi. Kullanılmazsa 0 bırakılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Masse des dritten Isotops. Bei Nichtverwendung auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse facultative du troisième isotope. Laisser 0 si non utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa opcional del tercer isótopo. Dejar en 0 si no se usa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة اختيارية للنظير الثالث. اترك 0 إذا لم يستخدم.

inputs.label: Isotope 3 Abundance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Optional abundance of the third isotope. Leave 0 if not used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional abundance of the third isotope. Leave 0 if not used.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü izotopun isteğe bağlı bolluğu. Kullanılmazsa 0 bırakılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Häufigkeit des dritten Isotops. Bei Nichtverwendung auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Abondance facultative du troisième isotope. Laisser 0 si non utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Abundancia opcional del tercer isótopo. Dejar en 0 si no se usa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وفرة اختيارية للنظير الثالث. اترك 0 إذا لم يستخدم.

inputs.label: Isotope 4 Mass (amu)
inputs.businessContext: Optional mass of the fourth isotope. Leave 0 if not used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional mass of the fourth isotope. Leave 0 if not used.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dördüncü izotopun isteğe bağlı kütlesi. Kullanılmazsa 0 bırakılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Masse des vierten Isotops. Bei Nichtverwendung auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse facultative du quatrième isotope. Laisser 0 si non utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa opcional del cuarto isótopo. Dejar en 0 si no se usa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة اختيارية للنظير الرابع. اترك 0 إذا لم يستخدم.

inputs.label: Isotope 4 Abundance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Optional abundance of the fourth isotope. Leave 0 if not used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional abundance of the fourth isotope. Leave 0 if not used.

businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Häufigkeit des vierten Isotops. Bei Nichtverwendung auf 0 setzen.

businessContext_i18n.es: Abundancia opcional del cuarto isótopo. Dejar en 0 si no se usa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وفرة اختيارية للنظير الرابع. اترك 0 إذا لم يستخدم.

formulas.atomicMass: ((mass1 * abundance1) + (mass2 * abundance2) + (mass3 * abundance3) + (mass4 * abundance4)) / (abundance1 + abundance2 + abundance3 + abundance4)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
